The actor who portrayed him is unknown. Piper meets this man at the gym. After talking together, they meet again and make love together. However, Piper doesn't like it and leaves the bed after sex.

characters.name: Vanessa
characters.description: Vanessa (Caputo.Possibly) Vanessa may be Joe Caputos and Natalie Figs adopted daughter. In the last episode (Here’s where we get off S7 EP13) Natalie and Joe wanted a boy but Vanessa came up to them and started to sing. It is unknown if Joe Caputo and Natalie Figueroa adopted her.
